description:
Shows the rules you set for a player who enters for the first time.
by [HardSiamang655](https://github.com/hardsiamang655) & [qreardedwastaken](https://qreardedwastaken.com) - [Go to the official Nukkit page.](https://cloudburstmc.org/resources/advancedrules.751/)
name: AdvancedRules

versions.changelog: We have released our v1.1.0 Update and have worked on all reported bugs. You can download it from our original Nukkit page.
versions.name: v1.1.0 Bug Fix Update
